content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "NEUTRAL",
    "reasoning": "Nifty flat near 24,120 with VIX easing to 18. Energy/Power and Metals leading; PSU Banks under pressure (-1.39%). Book is 59% deployed with multiple positions near key inflection points — focus on position management rather than fresh adds. Three pending BUY orders (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) already absorb remaining deployable capacity.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23999,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.98,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Best performer (+6.3%). SL already at 1029.98 (well above 1.5% trail buffer of breakeven 984). Tightening target slightly to 1095 (just below 52w high resistance 1141) for higher probability of hit. SL of 1029.98 is already aggressive trail; keeping it. New target 1095 vs CMP 1046 = ~5% R:R remaining is acceptable. NOTE: SL unchanged but target tightened — valid MODIFY."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "new_target": 420.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position +1.5%, SL already at breakeven+. Stock approaching 52w high at 414.40 — tightening target to 420 (just above 52w high) for higher probability hit. SL at 406 is fine. Target tightening is the only change."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "P&L shown as -4% but CMP 79.75 is above SL 76.50. Strong Q4 results (PAT +35%, GNPA 1.45%). PSU Bank index weak today but thesis intact. Holding to SL 76.50; target 85 is near 52w high 82.15 so realistic. Will revisit if break of 78 support."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 15,
      "reasoning": "-1.1% unrealized, well within SL. Acts as portfolio hedge against equity drawdown. Gold consolidating near 124 with FOMC this week — keep as macro hedge."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Stellar Q4 (PAT +27%, revenue +22.6%). Stock at 52w highs. SL 1413 already at breakeven. Position only +0.9%, so not yet at +2% trail trigger. Keep current SL/target — trail trigger will come on next move up."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 7,
      "reasoning": "-2% unrealized, SL 2295 still ~1.3% below. Q4 results April 30 — binary catalyst. Do not exit pre-result; let SL handle downside. Nestle's strong print may set high bar but read-through cushions some risk."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "-1.4% unrealized, SL 1770 just below CMP 1767.90 (touching). Stock at 52w highs after 39% monthly run — momentum extended. SL is appropriately tight. If 1770 breaks, exits cleanly with limited loss."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Near flat. Organon acquisition catalyst intact but valuation/integration concerns flagged by analysts. Q4 results May 19. SL 1720 is ~0.7% away — tight discipline maintained."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Flat. SL 318 only 0.7% away — tight. Defensive transmission monopoly, near 52w high. Power cluster exposure already significant (NTPC + TORNTPOWER + POWERGRID = ~31% of book) — no add."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "MAHABANK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 76.50 honored; thesis intact post strong Q4. PSU Bank weakness today is sector noise."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1029.98,
      "reasoning": "SL already aggressively trailed at 1029.98 (above breakeven). Locking in ~4.7% gain minimum. Target tightened to 1095 for higher hit probability."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge function. Within SL discipline."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at breakeven. Wait for >+2% before tightening further."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "HINDUNILVR",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Q4 result April 30 — binary event. Existing SL handles risk."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 406.00,
      "reasoning": "SL at breakeven+. Target compressed to 420 (just above 52w high 414.40) for realistic exit."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "TORNTPOWER",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1770 already tight at -2.2% from CMP. Momentum extended; let SL or target trigger."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Near flat; SL 1720 already tight at 0.7% from CMP."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Tight SL at 318 (0.7% away). Defensive, regulated returns. Power cluster cap reached."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "AUBANK/IDFCFIRSTB/MANAPPURAM gapped 10% on Q4 — no chase entries; revisit only on cleaner pullbacks to 5-EMA. HINDZINC has pending BUY at 612 but Q4 already announced and bearish marubozu printed Apr 23 — monitor; if order doesn't fill near 612 may cancel next session. INDIACEM extreme volume is UltraTech-acquisition-driven idiosyncratic flow, not tradeable thesis. KAYNES has REDUCE rating from HDFC Sec, avoid. MARUTI Q4 today — wait for post-result reaction.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 59% deployed with three OPEN BUY orders (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) that if filled would push deployment near max. Per deployment hysteresis rule, default disposition for new entries is NO_ACTION. Power cluster exposure (NTPC + TORNTPOWER + POWERGRID + pending TATAPOWER) is near concentration limit — no further power adds. Focus this week is risk management around HINDUNILVR Q4 result (Apr 30) and trailing SLs as positions move. Daily P&L flat; well within loss limit."
}
